task: Full audit and bug fix of ClawTask dashboard index.html

fixes.description: loadServices() called /api/services/status — endpoint does not exist. Correct endpoint is GET /api/services.
fixes.fix: Changed fetch('/api/services/status') to fetch('/api/services') and made response parsing robust: data.services || data || {}

fixes.description: loadPrompts() called /api/prompts/list — endpoint does not exist. Correct endpoint is GET /api/prompts.
fixes.fix: Changed fetch('/api/prompts/list') to fetch('/api/prompts') and made response parsing robust: d.files || d || []

fixes.description: loadPromptFile() called /api/prompts/file?path= — endpoint does not exist. Correct endpoint is GET /api/prompts/<key>.
savePrompt() called /api/prompts/save — endpoint does not exist. Correct endpoint is POST /api/prompts/<key>.
showNotif() called in two places but function is defined as notify(). Would throw ReferenceError at runtime.
fixes.fix: Replaced both showNotif(...) calls with notify(...)

fixes.description: showView() does document.getElementById('recurringBar') but the recurring-banner div had no id attribute. Element was always null — banner could never be shown/hidden when switching views.
showView() set boardArea.style.display = 'grid' but CSS defines .board-area as display:flex. This broke the kanban board layout.
showView() calls gnInit() for code-intel panel but function is defined as ciInit(). gnInit is never defined — would silently fail (typeof check masks the bug but init is skipped).
fixes.fix: Changed typeof gnInit === 'function' gnInit() to typeof ciInit === 'function' ciInit()

fixes.description: Terminal panel error message referenced wrong port 8099 instead of correct port 7474 for ClawTask API.

HTML textarea had id='broadcastMsg' and function was also named broadcastMsg(). DOM element shadows function name in some browsers, causing onclick='broadcastMsg()' to resolve to the element instead of the function.
fixes.fix: Renamed onclick handler to doBroadcast() and renamed the JS function to doBroadcast()

fixes.description: loadSubagentsPanel() called non-existent /api/subagents and /api/mq/length endpoints. Replaced with /api/agents (which is in spec) and /api/tasks/queue as MQ length proxy.
fixes.fix: Changed /api/subagents to /api/agents with grouping by dept; changed /api/mq/length to /api/tasks/queue for count; added response shape normalization

additional_improvements.description: Made loadKnowledge() response parsing robust — handles both array and {files:[]} response shapes
Made readKnowledgeFile() content parsing robust — handles both raw text and JSON {content:...} response shapes
Fixed doBroadcast() to actually send the user-typed message instead of a hardcoded test string

endpoints_verified: GET /api/agents — OK (used in agents panel and subagents panel)
POST /api/tool-run — OK (terminal, media studio, security tools)
GET /api/tasks/queue — OK (used as MQ length proxy)
